name: Fotopro X2 Lite Compact Tripod
description: The X2 Lite Compact Tripod from Fotopro is a lightweight, compact tripod with a pan-tilt head. It is suitable for use with compact cameras, mirrorless cameras, and small DSLRs.

features.Key Features:: Load Capacity: 8.8 lb | Maximum Height: 61.8" | Minimum Height: 20.9" | Folded Length: 21.7" | Weight: 2.94 lb | 3 Leg Sections with Flip Lock Joints | Smartphone Holder, Action Camera Mount | 360° Pan Base with Locking Knob
